betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Oily Scraps§f

§aGrimy residue from processing polluted materials — a source of arsenic!§f

§bOily Scraps§f are obtained by shredding various polluted earth blocks.

§6Sources§f (shredder):
§b• Cracked Stone§f
§b• Oily Sand§f
§b• Red Oily Sand§f
§b• Dead Dirt§f
§b• Porous Stone§f
§b• Oily Dirt§f

§6Key Use§f:
§b• Arsenic Nugget§f — 16 Oily Scraps + 100 mB High-Performance Solvent in the Ore Acidizer

§eTip§f: Collect these scraps from any oil-bearing biome processing. They're a renewable source of arsenic once you have the Ore Acidizer set up!
